---
title: "player-features-prepatch-740 analysis"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    code-fold: true
---

Placeholder notebook. Populated after the full run completes with:

- coverage-bucket val_auc table (compare to player-features-740)
- history-source-breakdown table (mean prepatch fraction per bucket)
- feature importance top-20 vs player-features-740
- side-by-side calibration plots
- anonymous-per-match histogram (unchanged by definition; sanity)
